untranslatable_reason: Signal references 'confirmation line' (undefined pattern-specific level), 'gap occurrence' timing prediction (forward-looking, not retroactive), and market regime states 'BULL_MARKET'/'BEAR_MARKET' which are not in ALLOWED_REGIMES list. The throwback/pullback mechanics require forward-looking gap detection unavailable in indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: entry near pivot support (confirmation line proxy), exit on reversal. However, core signal logic cannot be translated without: (1) pattern-specific confirmation line definition, (2) gap detection capability, (3) forward-looking entry timing. Market regimes should use TRENDING_UP/TRENDING_DOWN instead of BULL_MARKET/BEAR_MARKET. Requires custom gap detection logic outside standard indicators.
